title: Bulbophyllum mundulum
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum mundulum is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. This classification is based on the plant's unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other orchids. Further, Bulbophyllum mundulum is placed within the genus Bulbophyllum, a group of orchids commonly known as the "bulbophyllums" or "petite orchids". Within the genus, it is likely to be classified as a species within the subgenus Cirrhopetalum or the subgenus Macrophyllum. However, the exact classification may vary depending on the source and the latest taxonomic research.
